# License {.unnumbered}

Copyright (C) 2026 Tyler

*Applied Math Done Right: Linear Algebra Foundations* includes both book content and source code. Different parts of the project are licensed under different noncommercial licenses.

## Book Content

Unless otherwise stated, the prose, mathematical exposition, exercises, solutions, diagrams, figures, tables, and other non-code educational content are licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.

License: <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/>

You may share and adapt the book content for noncommercial purposes, provided that you give appropriate credit, link to the license, indicate whether changes were made, and distribute adaptations under the same license.

## Source Code

Unless otherwise stated, the C++ source code, starter code, completed library code, CMake files, tests, and software examples are licensed under the PolyForm Noncommercial License 1.0.0.

License: <https://polyformproject.org/licenses/noncommercial/1.0.0/>

SPDX-License-Identifier: `PolyForm-Noncommercial-1.0.0`

You may use, study, modify, and distribute the software for noncommercial purposes, subject to the terms of the PolyForm Noncommercial License 1.0.0.

## Commercial Use

Commercial use of the book content or source code is not permitted under the public licenses above. For commercial licensing, contact the copyright holder.

## Third-Party Material

Third-party material remains under its original license. Where third-party material appears in this book or accompanying source code, attribution and license information should be provided near the material or in a dedicated acknowledgments section.

## No Warranty

This book and accompanying source code are provided as-is, without warranties or guarantees of correctness, fitness for a particular purpose, or suitability for production use.
